creator: lucas.kanashiro@collabora.com
text:
Created attachment 202018
Patch to update to version 2.8.13

The latest upstream version of sysutils/py-google-compute-engine (2.8.13) has some new features and fixes that will improve the user experience using GCE cloud images. We also need to update sysutils/google-compute-engine-oslogin to version 1.4.3.
